```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(forecast)
library(tseries)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
```

```{r}
INPUT_FILE <- "../../data/processed/merged_features_weekly.parquet"
FREQ <- 52
ALPHA <- 0.05

calc_smape <- function(actual, pred) {
  mean(200 * abs(actual - pred) / (abs(actual) + abs(pred)), na.rm = TRUE)
}
```

```{r}
df <- arrow::read_parquet(INPUT_FILE) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(date)

if (!"target_was_missing" %in% names(df)) df$target_was_missing <- 0L

commodities <- unique(df$commodity)
```

```{r}
all_results <- list()
all_models <- list()
all_preds <- list()

for (comm in commodities) {

  sub <- df %>%
    filter(commodity == comm) %>%
    arrange(date)

  train_df <- sub %>%
    filter(split == "train") %>%
    drop_na(target_price)

  test_df <- sub %>%
    filter(split == "test") %>%
    drop_na(target_price)

  if (nrow(train_df) < 30 || nrow(test_df) == 0) next

  n_test <- nrow(test_df)
  train_ts <- ts(train_df$target_price, frequency = FREQ)

  # Holt-Winters Additive
  model_add <- tryCatch(
    ets(train_ts, model = "AAA", damped = FALSE),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  pred_add <- if (!is.null(model_add)) as.numeric(forecast(model_add, h = n_test)$mean) else rep(NA, n_test)

  # Holt-Winters Multiplicative
  model_mult <- tryCatch(
    {
      if (any(train_df$target_price <= 0, na.rm = TRUE)) stop("Non-positive values")
      ets(train_ts, model = "MAM", damped = FALSE)
    },
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  pred_mult <- if (!is.null(model_mult)) as.numeric(forecast(model_mult, h = n_test)$mean) else rep(NA, n_test)

  # Automatic ETS
  model_ets <- tryCatch(
    ets(train_ts, model = "ZZZ"),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  pred_ets <- if (!is.null(model_ets)) as.numeric(forecast(model_ets, h = n_test)$mean) else rep(NA, n_test)

  ets_label <- if (!is.null(model_ets)) paste0("ETS (", model_ets$method, ")") else "ETS (auto)"

  pred_df <- tibble(
    date = test_df$date,
    actual = test_df$target_price,
    was_missing = test_df$target_was_missing,
    additive = pred_add,
    multiplicative = pred_mult,
    ets_auto = pred_ets
  )

  real_idx <- pred_df$was_missing == 0

  smape_add <- if (!is.null(model_add))
    round(calc_smape(pred_df$actual[real_idx], pred_df$additive[real_idx]), 4)
  else NA

  smape_mult <- if (!is.null(model_mult))
    round(calc_smape(pred_df$actual[real_idx], pred_df$multiplicative[real_idx]), 4)
  else NA

  smape_ets <- if (!is.null(model_ets))
    round(calc_smape(pred_df$actual[real_idx], pred_df$ets_auto[real_idx]), 4)
  else NA

  models_fitted <- list(
    "HW Additive (AAA)" = model_add,
    "HW Multiplicative (MAM)" = model_mult
  )

  models_fitted[[ets_label]] <- model_ets

  results <- tibble(
    commodity = comm,
    model = c("HW Additive (AAA)", "HW Multiplicative (MAM)", ets_label),
    sMAPE = c(smape_add, smape_mult, smape_ets)
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sMAPE))

  all_results[[comm]] <- results
  all_models[[comm]] <- models_fitted
  all_preds[[comm]] <- pred_df
}

results_df <- bind_rows(all_results)
```

### ALL HOLT-WINTERS / ETS MODELS — sMAPE

```{r echo=FALSE}
kable(results_df)
```

```{r}
best_df <- results_df %>%
  group_by(commodity) %>%
  slice_min(sMAPE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()
```

### BEST MODEL PER COMMODITY (by sMAPE)

```{r echo=FALSE}
kable(best_df)
```

### Residual diagnostics for best models

```{r echo=FALSE}
for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_df))) {

  comm <- best_df$commodity[i]
  best_model <- best_df$model[i]
  model_obj <- all_models[[comm]][[best_model]]

  cat("\n####", comm, "—", best_model, "\n\n")

  resid_clean <- as.numeric(residuals(model_obj))
  resid_clean <- resid_clean[!is.na(resid_clean)]

  lb <- Box.test(resid_clean, lag = 10, type = "Ljung-Box")

  cat(sprintf(
    "  Ljung-Box(10) p-value: %.4f %s\n",
    lb$p.value,
    ifelse(lb$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")
  ))

  if (length(resid_clean) <= 5000) {
    nt <- shapiro.test(resid_clean)

    cat(sprintf(
      "  Shapiro-Wilk p-value: %.4f %s\n",
      nt$p.value,
      ifelse(nt$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")
    ))
  }

  cat("\n")
}
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
plots <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_df))) {

  comm <- best_df$commodity[i]
  best_model <- best_df$model[i]
  best_smape <- best_df$sMAPE[i]

  sub <- df %>%
    filter(commodity == comm) %>%
    arrange(date)

  train_df <- sub %>%
    filter(split == "train") %>%
    drop_na(target_price)

  cutoff <- max(train_df$date) - 365 * 2

  train_plot <- train_df %>%
    filter(date >= cutoff)

  pred_df <- all_preds[[comm]]

  pred_col <- switch(best_model,
    "HW Additive (AAA)" = "additive",
    "HW Multiplicative (MAM)" = "multiplicative",
    "ets_auto"
  )

  test_plot <- pred_df %>%
    select(date, actual, pred = all_of(pred_col))

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(
      data = train_plot,
      aes(x = date, y = target_price),
      color = "grey60",
      linewidth = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = test_plot,
      aes(x = date, y = actual, color = "Actual"),
      linewidth = 0.9
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = test_plot,
      aes(x = date, y = pred, color = "Forecast"),
      linewidth = 0.9,
      linetype = "dashed"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Actual" = "#2c3e50", "Forecast" = "#e74c3c"),
      name = NULL
    ) +
    labs(
      title = comm,
      subtitle = sprintf("%s  |  sMAPE = %.2f", best_model, best_smape),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Price"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )

  plots[[i]] <- p
}

if (length(plots) > 0) {

  combined <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Holt-Winters / ETS — Best Model Forecast vs Actual",
      theme = theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
      )
    )

  print(combined)
}
```
